subject: [POLICY] Use common mariadb instance
commit_message:
[POLICY] Use common mariadb instance

Have following updates for Policy:
- Add section under .Values.global for shared mariadb instance default
info with a condition to instantiate local instance.
- Add the related sections of Mariadb-init and Mariadb-galera under
.Values with removing unnecessary parameters
- Add condition under requirments.yaml to install local mariadb instance
- Remove databases creation script (db.sh) and use mariadb-init options

Have following updates for policy-api, policy-clamp-be, policy-drools
-pdp, policy-pap, policy-clamp-cl-runtime and policy-xacml-pdp:
- Update .Values to accommodate for the new changes in parent .Values
- Update deployments, jobs and statefulsets to include the definitions
of mariadb service and port defined in (common/_mariadb.tpl)
- Update resources to reflect the new parameters.
- [for policy-clamp-be only] update clamp mariadb job to use the image
decided by repository generator of mariadb.

Issue-ID: OOM-2814
Signed-off-by: Mahmoud Abdelhamid <mahmoud.abdelhamid@orange.com>
Change-Id: I2b3b88343f98f8e79a671f58b4165e4a059935ef
